name: pr_allen_b0_touch
drl:
rule Rbefore when $a : A() B(this before[0ms,1000ms] $a) then end
rule Rmeets when $a : A() B(this meets $a) then end
rule Rstarts when $a : A() B(this starts $a) then end
rule Rfinishes when $a : A() B(this finishes $a) then end
rule Rafter when $a : A() B(this after[0ms,1000ms] $a) then end
rule Rmetby when $a : A() B(this metby $a) then end
rule Rduring when $a : A() B(this during $a) then end
_finding: Corner A (external review round 24): probe B=[0,100] touches anchor A=[100,200] exactly - before[0ms,...] INCLUDES the gap-0 touching instant that meets owns, so the windowed and interval families DOUBLE-MATCH at the seam (Rbefore + Rmeets both fire). Faithful: explicit lo=0 means gap >= 0; strict-before is lo=1. Pinned so the seam convention is on the record.
